interpretation.why_not_complete: The workspace contains reference-project ONNX/PT/GIF assets and many debug NPZ artifacts, but it does not contain the required official/teacher-rollout BeyondMimic tracking/VAE/diffusion checkpoints, TensorRT engine, closed-loop rollout logs, Fig.5/Fig.6 artifacts, or reproduced success/failure videos. It does contain one public-LAFAN1 paper-architecture VAE/diffusion checkpoint, which is recorded separately and must not be counted as an official DAgger/closed-loop paper checkpoint. It also contains resource-adjusted G1 PPO checkpoints, which prove local virtual training execution but are separately excluded from official paper-level tracking artifacts.

rows.required_artifact: Trained motion-tracking policy checkpoint/export for BeyondMimic G1 tracking.
rows.why_missing_or_not_accepted: Downloaded ONNX/PT files are reference Unitree/ASAP/PBHC assets, not a newly trained BeyondMimic tracking export from this reproduction.

rows.required_artifact: BeyondMimic motion policy ONNX satisfying the official motion_tracking_controller contract.
rows.why_missing_or_not_accepted: The contract audit and debug ONNX export prove exporter/consumer compatibility, but no live IsaacLab export from a trained BeyondMimic policy exists.

rows.required_artifact: Trained conditional VAE checkpoint from true DAgger teacher/student rollouts.
rows.why_missing_or_not_accepted: Local VAE evidence is architecture/loss/debug accumulation plus a save/load smoke checkpoint only; no trained VAE model checkpoint is present.

rows.required_artifact: True DAgger rollout logs with teacher query, aggregation, closed-loop rollout, stability, and student/teacher comparison.
rows.why_missing_or_not_accepted: Existing DAgger manifest is explicitly synthetic/debug; no live teacher rollout or teacher-query aggregation log exists.

rows.required_artifact: State-latent trajectory dataset produced by trained VAE rollouts, with accept/reject provenance and splits.
rows.why_missing_or_not_accepted: Paper-state windows and rejection manifests are debug fixtures with synthetic latents, not VAE rollout latents from trained policies.
Only architecture/forward-backward/debug overfit probes, a state-dict hash manifest, and a two-step EMA smoke exist; no trained diffusion checkpoint is present.

rows.required_artifact: TensorRT engine or plan for the trained diffusion policy.
rows.why_missing_or_not_accepted: Paper TensorRT deployment is indexed, but no TensorRT engine/plan exists locally.

rows.required_artifact: Closed-loop tracking evaluation logs/metrics from live IsaacLab/Kit rollout.
rows.why_missing_or_not_accepted: Static/source contracts and released-data plots exist, but live Kit rollout evaluation remains blocked by the inotify gate.

rows.required_artifact: Figure 5 joystick/waypoint/latent visualization rollout data, metrics, and visuals.
rows.why_missing_or_not_accepted: Debug guidance probes exist, but no paper Fig. 5 rollout logs, trained checkpoints, or released Fig. 5 data are present.

rows.required_artifact: Figure 6 inpainting/obstacle rollout data, metrics, and visuals.
rows.why_missing_or_not_accepted: Debug mask/SDF probes exist, but no paper Fig. 6 closed-loop rollout logs or released Fig. 6 data are present.

rows.required_artifact: Success and failure videos for all Phase 8 guidance tasks.
rows.why_missing_or_not_accepted: Downloaded GIF/MP4 files are reference-project docs/demos, not reproduced BeyondMimic task videos.

rows.required_artifact: MuJoCo/ROS sim-to-sim execution logs, bags, or deployment evaluation from motion_tracking_controller.
rows.why_missing_or_not_accepted: ROS 2 Jazzy/Noble deployment stack is unavailable on this host; only static controller audits exist.

rows.required_artifact: Paper-level multi-seed tracking/VAE/diffusion metrics from completed training/evaluation runs.
rows.why_missing_or_not_accepted: Current multi-seed evidence is smoke/debug statistics; paper-level tracking/VAE/diffusion training metrics remain missing.

rows.required_artifact: At least one completed full training run directory with config, logs, metrics, checkpoint, figures, videos, and SUCCESS status.
rows.why_missing_or_not_accepted: Existing run directories are diagnostic or checkpoint-resume plumbing, not completed PPO/VAE/diffusion training runs.

rows.required_artifact: Resource-adjusted G1 PPO checkpoints are present but must not be counted as official BeyondMimic tracking checkpoints.
rows.why_missing_or_not_accepted: The checkpoints come from the generated resource-adjusted USD and official-CSV-derived motion path. They prove local virtual PPO execution but are not official replay outputs, not a paper-scale teacher, and not paper-level BeyondMimic tracking results.

rows.required_artifact: Diagnostic checkpoint/resume, VAE smoke checkpoint, diffusion smoke checkpoint, bounded debug diffusion checkpoint, and resource-adjusted tiny debug checkpoint artifacts are present but must not be counted as trained model checkpoints.
rows.why_missing_or_not_accepted: The diagnostic NPZ proves resume plumbing, the debug VAE PT proves save/load consistency, the debug diffusion PT proves save/load/resume consistency, the bounded debug diffusion PT proves a 3-step optimizer-run checkpoint only, and the resource-adjusted tiny PT proves a small debug denoiser only; all are explicitly excluded from trained-model counts.

rows.required_artifact: Debug-only guidance and tiny diffusion preview GIF/figures are present but must not be counted as paper success/failure videos.
rows.why_missing_or_not_accepted: These GIFs are generated from formula-level guidance fixtures or offline tiny-diffusion token previews and are explicitly marked not trained rollouts or paper Fig. 5/Fig. 6 videos.

rows.required_artifact: Bundled official/dependency documentation GIFs are present but must not be counted as reproduced BeyondMimic videos.
rows.why_missing_or_not_accepted: These GIFs come from bundled IsaacLab/reference documentation under reproduction/third_party/official, not from a local BeyondMimic rollout or paper Fig. 5/Fig. 6 reproduction.

scope: goal.md/paper-required trained, rollout, deployment, and video artifacts with reference-artifact separation
